title: Wavys Lazy Modpack
description: Vanilla++ modpack the aims to flesh out Minecraft's general content
body:
# Focus
 <details>
<summary>Fun</summary>

WLM is focuses on adding vanilla++ content to areas I think Minecraft is lacking in and making the game more fun to play with friends

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Building</summary>

More possibilites for creative buildings with more modded blocks designed for creativity.

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Multiplayer</summary>

With mods like E4MC its easy to make a world with your friends while being simple and more secure.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Performance</summary>

With mods like Sodium, Indium, and more youre able to get plenty of frames on any hardware, even with Iris shaders

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Enhancements</summary>

Tons of mods to enhance the vanilla++ experience.

</details>

#

<details>
<summary>Recommendations</summary>
4GB+ of ram, and friends :D.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Attributions</summary>
Mod Menu Helper - [https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu]
Aurora's Shaders - [https://modrinth.com/shader/auroras-shaders] , Any issues with the shaders are likely my own fault and not on the Aurora pack's team
</details>

<details>
<summary>Hint!</summary>

WLM is more bestester than my other modpacks...
</details>
